metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5356
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure S3: confocal imaging of immunofluorescence labeling for Ubc13 (UBE2N) and PSD-95 (DLG4) in cultured hippocampal neurons showed Ubc13 localization is ubiquitous in dendrites and spines, and partially co-localizes with PSD95 (in biochemical fractions, Ubc13 was also ubiquitous. Fig. 3). Further, Ubc13 immunoprecipitation in mouse forebrain yields PSD95.

"In vitro ubiquitination assays using purified proteins showed that TRAF6, in conjunction with Ubc13/Uev1A, effectively delivered the ubiquitin moieties to PSD-95, which did not occur when TRAF6, UbK63, Ubc13, Uev1A, or PSD-95 was omitted from the reaction mix (Fig. 3E).". Experimental description: M&M: "high-density (1 × 106) hippocampal neurons were prepared from E18 rat embryos"

antibody:
anti-Ubc13 (ProSci, 3373)
